title: Permanent residence pathway for foreign nationals in Canada who were under State care - Canada.ca
content:
## Permanent residence pathway for foreign nationals who
    were in state care
Status: Open until January 21, 2027
We've put a temporary public policy in place in recognition of the vulnerability of certain foreign nationals who
- came to Canada under the age of 19
- were under the legal responsibility of a child and family services provider
- may now face removal
This will provide a pathway to permanent residence to eligible foreign nationals and their
            family members in Canada.
Eligible foreign nationals who were in state care don't pay a fee for a permanent residence
                    application
                    under this policy.

## If you want to stay temporarily
Eligible foreign nationals who were in state care can also apply for a temporary resident permit to allow them
        to
        stay in Canada as temporary residents. Learn
            more about the temporary resident permit.
